name: JK Girl Samurai - AOI no mon
short_description: This is a side scrolling pixel game, players take on the role of a JK girl use various sword drawing techniques to deal with the enemy. On the way to find family, passing through Japanese style streets and Mount Fuji, what mysteries will be uncovered afterwards?
detailed_description: JK Girl Samurai is a 2D side scrolling pixel game (not porn game) where players take on the role of a JK sword drawn girl whose family members have gone missing. While searching for her family, players must overcome obstacles and use various techniques in sword drawing, such as general attack, combo, swallow return, and flash of the god, by operating the keyboard You can also purchase bloodthirsty skills, and the protagonist played by the player will encounter different enemies such as thugs, warriors, geisha, ninjas, skeletons, and more Pixel style Japanese architecture, terrifying hellish space. Players can use mouse operations to advance the plot and experience the rebirth of confusion, loss, and despair with the cute protagonist. What secrets will they discover later?...
